operations.name: search_query
operations.description: Pull data via Google Ads Query Language (GAQL)
operations.example: SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions FROM campaign WHERE segments.date DURING LAST_7_DAYS
operations.notes: cost_micros = cost in micro-units (divide by 1M for currency).

operations.name: create_campaign
operations.description: Create a Performance Max or Search campaign
operations.notes: Always create PAUSED. Performance Max requires asset groups (not ad groups).

known_limitations: Developer token requires Google approval (basic vs standard tier).
Customer ID format strict : XXX-XXX-XXXX (with dashes for display, no dashes for API).
PMAX assets cannot be edited after asset group creation, only added.
learned_rules: Always test with --dry-run before mutate operations.
Conversion uploads via OfflineUserDataJobService for server-side tracking.
Use cost_micros throughout, format display only at output.
